name: Marc Cary
abstract: Marc Cary (born January 29, 1967) is an American jazz pianist based out of New York City. Cary has played and recorded with a number of well-known musicians, including Dizzy Gillespie, Betty Carter, Roy Hargrove, Arthur Taylor, Abbey Lincoln, Carlos Garnett, Erykah Badu, Meshell Ndegeocello, Stefon Harris, Lauryn Hill, Ani DiFranco, Jack…

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Abbey Lincoln and Ornette Coleman
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
